566 VA09A VA09A_BEHAVE_TR (VA09A) Behavioral Symptoms Triggered CHAR 1 RAP summary: behavioral symptoms - triggered. 0 = Not Triggered, 1 = Triggered, "-" = Determination precluded by missing data.
